rows.requirement: Robust JSON parsing tolerates code fences (matches json_fences precedent)
Never crashes on totally unparseable LLM output (fallback, disclosed non-primary path)
Entity canonicalization/dedup is case- and whitespace-insensitive
Build entity graph: doc->entities, entity->docs, entity co-occurrence edges
retrieve_documents matches vector_rag.py's list[str] ranked-doc-id output shape
Query entity matching tolerates substring/near-miss phrasing (real, non-strawman entity linking)
Deterministic tie-break / no dropped or duplicated doc ids
Acceptance criterion: real entity-graph-driven retrieval against fixture corpus+queries
Genuine graph traversal (not just literal string entity match) -- fairness constraint #3

rows.test: manual check: git diff agents/pyproject.toml is empty
manual check: grep for OPENROUTER/GEMINI/.env/os.environ in new files -- none found
